args.subject: Checkout v9.2.0: rollout complete
args.body:
Checkout v9.2.0 has been successfully rolled out across all environments:

- checkout-staging: deployed and verified
- checkout-eu: deployed and verified
- checkout-us: deployed and verified

All smoke checks passed in each environment. The rollout is complete.
